name: INSIGHTS Consumer Contract
description: Outbound read dependency. INSIGHTS consumes explicit BoundRevision, NoBudgetPlan, or NoActiveBudgetPlanRevision evidence through one BUDGET-owned coherent operation. Every result carries bounded dated actual members, exact public LEDGER budget-actual total, and shared snapshot provenance; only BoundRevision carries immutable plan detail and the canonical BudgetPosition. INSIGHTS owns exact-window interpretation, signals, explanations, and Report Snapshots and receives no plan mutation, private-storage, independent LEDGER cursor, or BUDGET calculation authority.
